title: WineDB: Fine Wine Vintages & Blends (Sample)
subtitle: Wineries, vintages, exact varietal blend percentages, and tasting descriptors
description:
# 🍷 WineDB — Fine Wine & Vintages Sample Dataset

A curated **free sample** of the WineDB dataset: highly normalized relational tables tracking fine wine producers, cuvees, exact vintage varietal blend percentages (`SUM <= 100.001`, enforced by SQLite triggers), alcohol content (ABV %), organoleptic tasting descriptors, and secondary market valuation indices. Prefer SQLite? The same sample ships as a relational `winedb.sqlite` (foreign keys + blend-sum triggers) on [the WineDB site](https://wine-database.pages.dev/) and [GitHub](https://github.com/WhiskyyDB/wine-database/blob/main/samples/winedb.sqlite).

## What's in this sample

| File | Rows | What it shows |
| :--- | ---: | :--- |
| `wineries.csv` | 26 | Producer registry with country, region, founded year + source URL |
| `wines.csv` | 27 | Canonical wine cuvees with type and appellation |
| `vintages.csv` | 59 | Year-specific releases: ABV, bottle specs, aging regime, release price, valuation index |
| `blends.csv` | 171 | Exact varietal composition percentages per vintage |
| `tasting_profiles.csv` | 236 | Organoleptic aromatic and palate descriptors |
| `appellations.csv` | 27 | Controlled geographical indication taxonomy |

## The full dataset

- **3,675 vintages** across **106 iconic wineries** and 57 appellations
- Laboratory chemistry (`residual_sugar`, `acidity`, `pH`) from SAQ & LCBO listings
- Liv-ex style auction valuation medians under a strict `>= 3 observations` rule
- US TTB COLA label registry links & OCR text payloads
- Master 11,960-row `data_sources` provenance registry — every record resolves to a source ledger entry
- 3NF relational `winedb.sqlite` + 7 normalized CSV exports, refreshed monthly

**→ Get it at [wine-database.pages.dev](https://wine-database.pages.dev/)** · [GitHub: WhiskyyDB/wine-database](https://github.com/WhiskyyDB/wine-database) · [Data dictionary](https://github.com/WhiskyyDB/wine-database/blob/main/DATA_DICTIONARY.md) · [Sources & licenses](https://github.com/WhiskyyDB/wine-database/blob/main/SOURCES.md)

## Use cases

- Wine list & hospitality software (clean producer/cuvee/vintage names, ABV, bottle specs)
- Varietal-blend analytics and recommendation engines (exact percentages, not just labels)
- Valuation and vintage-quality models on release price vs. secondary market index
- Teaching relational schema design: six cleanly normalized, join-ready tables
- ML / RAG corpora over a provenance-tracked wine knowledge base

## License

Sample: **CC-BY-4.0** — free for any use including commercial, with attribution.

Questions, corrections, or full-dataset access: **winedb.obedient560@aleeas.com**

resources.description: 26 fine-wine producers: winery_id, name, country, region, founded_year, source_url.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Producer name (e.g. Chateau Margaux, Opus One Winery).

fields.name: region
fields.description: Wine region / sub-region (e.g. Napa Valley, Pauillac).

fields.name: founded_year
fields.description: Year the winery was founded; empty when not published.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Provenance: source URL the record was derived from.

resources.description: 27 canonical cuvees: wine_id, winery_name, name, wine_type, appellation_name.

fields.name: winery_name
fields.description: Producer name (denormalized join key to wineries).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Canonical cuvee name (e.g. Insignia, Monte Bello).

fields.name: wine_type
fields.description: Style classification: Red, White, Sparkling, Sweet/Fortified.

fields.name: appellation_name
fields.description: Controlled geographical indication the wine belongs to.

resources.description: 59 vintage releases: vintage_year, abv_percent, bottle_volume_ml, aging_regime, production_cases, release_price_usd, valuation_index_usd, source_url.

fields.name: aging_regime
fields.description: Oak/aging program as published by the producer; empty when unstated.

fields.name: production_cases
fields.description: Cases produced; empty when not disclosed.

fields.name: release_price_usd
fields.description: Release price in USD; empty when not published.

fields.name: valuation_index_usd
fields.description: Median secondary-market valuation (USD); NULL unless >= 3 independent observations in a 12-month window.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Provenance: source URL the record was derived from.

resources.description: 171 varietal blend rows: exact percent per variety per vintage (sums to <= 100.001 per vintage).

fields.name: percent
fields.description: Exact share of the variety in the blend; per-vintage sum <= 100.001 (trigger-enforced).

fields.name: descriptor
fields.description: Controlled organoleptic descriptor (aroma/palate), e.g. Black currant, Graphite.

resources.description: 27 geographical indications: name, country, classification, parent_region.

fields.name: classification
fields.description: Legal scheme: AOC, DOCG, AVA, etc.; empty when unclassified.

fields.name: parent_region
fields.description: Parent region in the GI hierarchy; empty for top-level.

userSpecifiedSources: https://wine-database.pages.dev/, https://github.com/WhiskyyDB/wine-database (SOURCES.md: SAQ/LCBO listings, Liv-ex style auction observations, US TTB COLA registry)
